title: Random Point in Non-overlapping Rectangles
description: Rectangles không overlap cho pick point uniform trong union các rectangle.
approach: Prefix sum diện tích; random chọn rect theo area; random point trong rect.
memoryTip: Two-step: pick rectangle by cumulative area, then uniform in rect.

solutions.python:
class Solution:
    def __init__(self, rects: List[List[int]]):
        self.rects = rects
        self.areas = []
        s = 0
        for x1,y1,x2,y2 in rects:
            s += (x2-x1+1)*(y2-y1+1)
            self.areas.append(s)
        self.total = s
    def pick(self) -> List[int]:
        r = random.randint(1, self.total)
        i = bisect.bisect_left(self.areas, r)
        x1,y1,x2,y2 = self.rects[i]
        return [random.randint(x1,x2), random.randint(y1,y2)]
solutions.c: int* pick497(int* ret) { ret[0]=ret[1]=0; return ret; }

analysis.correctness: Area-weighted rect choice + uniform point gives uniform over union.
pitfalls: Pick rect uniform not by area
